executive_summary: Multiple critical vulnerabilities are being actively exploited in the wild: CVE-2025-53521 (F5 BIG-IP APM) and CVE-2026-33634 (Aquasecurity Trivy scanner) have been added to CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, with CVE-2026-33634 weaponized by TeamPCP in a supply chain attack. Iran-linked threat group Handala successfully breached FBI Director Kash Patel's personal Gmail account and launched wiper attacks against U.S. defense contractor Stryker. ShinyHunters claims a massive 350GB data breach of the European Commission's systems. Canadian energy company Q2 Artificial Lift Services was hit by ransomware group Payload, and GeoMechanics Technologies (Canada operations) was compromised by Akira ransomware.

items.description: Remote code execution vulnerability in F5 BIG-IP APM systems

canada_landscape.summary: Two Canadian companies were hit by ransomware: Q2 Artificial Lift Services (by Payload group) and GeoMechanics Technologies (by Akira group). No CCCS advisories were published in this 48-hour period. ShinyHunters' breach of the European Commission potentially affects Canadian government communications with EU institutions. No direct attacks on Canadian federal infrastructure or major retailers/banks were reported.

report_2w.executive_summary: CISA has flagged two vulnerabilities now actively exploited in the wild: CVE-2026-33017 (Langflow code injection allowing AI workflow hijacking) and CVE-2026-33634 (affecting GitHub Actions supply chain). Cisco released patches for a critical remote code execution flaw (CVE-2026-20131) in Secure Firewall that grants root access. Nova Scotia Power suffered a major data breach exposing over 900,000 Canadian customers. Iran-linked ransomware group Pay2Key has re-emerged, while Chinese APT group Red Menshen was discovered deep inside telecom backbone infrastructure using stealthy BPFDoor implants.

canada_landscape.summary: Nova Scotia Power suffered a significant data breach affecting over 900,000 customers, representing one of the largest Canadian utility breaches in recent memory. No CCCS advisories were identified in this collection period. Multiple Reddit discussions covered non-cybersecurity Canadian policy issues including foreign interference concerns related to India and broader geopolitical matters.
